evals.prompt: How do I define an Ideal Customer Profile for my B2B SaaS startup?

evals.description: Triggers on lead scoring model build request
evals.prompt: I need to build a lead scoring model. Where do I start?

evals.description: Correctly explains the difference between MQL, SQL, and PQL
evals.prompt: What is the difference between an MQL, SQL, and PQL?

evals.description: Explains intent signal tiers with examples
evals.prompt: What are intent signals and how should I weight them in my scoring model?

evals.description: Explains score decay and why it is needed
evals.prompt: What is lead score decay and why should I implement it?

evals.description: Provides threshold-setting process using historical data
evals.prompt: How do I decide what score threshold to use for MQL handoff to sales?

evals.description: Warns against scoring without fit criteria
evals.prompt: I want to score leads purely based on website behavior - page visits, email opens, downloads. Is that enough?
How does BANT fit into lead scoring?
Should I define which leads to explicitly exclude from my scoring model?

evals.description: Addresses sales and marketing alignment on MQL definitions
evals.prompt: Our sales team keeps rejecting the MQLs marketing sends them. What's going wrong?

evals.description: Explains how to validate a scoring model against outcomes
evals.prompt: How do I know if my lead scoring model is actually working?

evals.description: Does not recommend building complex ML model before validating a simple one
evals.prompt: Should I use machine learning to build a predictive lead scoring model from day one?
